title: helipterum eximium
intro: Helipterum eximium, also known as the common everlasting, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to southern Australia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Helipterum eximium include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting wound healing and skin regeneration. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures and infusions, can be made by infusing the flowers and leaves in hot water, and can be used to treat a range of health issues.
